description: IEEE 33-Bus DER Ground-Truth State: 96-step (15-min) power-flow snapshot from 2017-06-07, a high-DER DE day. Panels: bus voltage profile/envelope, line loadings, total losses, DG solar/wind output, slack feed-in (with reverse-power-flow midday), OLTC tap position.

panels.description: Bus voltage magnitudes (pu) for key DER buses (17, 21, 24, 32) and slack-side bus 0. Threshold lines at 0.95 and 1.05 pu mark the OLTC deadband. Physics: midday PV/wind injection pushes DER bus voltages toward/above 1.0 pu; OLTC taps to hold the deadband.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "state")
  |> range(start: 2017-06-07T00:00:00Z, stop: 2017-06-07T23:59:59Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "bus")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "vm_pu")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.bus_id == "0" or r.bus_id == "17" or r.bus_id == "21" or r.bus_id == "24" or r.bus_id == "32")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: Bus Voltage Profile / Envelope (pu)

panels.description: Line loading (%) for feeder trunk lines 0, 1, 2 and representative lateral lines 10, 20. Higher loading midday as DER injects power back through the feeder; peak loading occurs at peak evening demand (steps 68-73).

targets.query:
from(bucket: "state")
  |> range(start: 2017-06-07T00:00:00Z, stop: 2017-06-07T23:59:59Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "line")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "loading_percent")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.line_id == "0" or r.line_id == "1" or r.line_id == "2" or r.line_id == "10" or r.line_id == "20")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: Line Loadings (%)

panels.description: Total system active power losses (MW). Losses dip at midday as DER generation reduces net feeder current; losses peak at evening demand peak when reverse-flow currents subside and load current maximises.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "state")
  |> range(start: 2017-06-07T00:00:00Z, stop: 2017-06-07T23:59:59Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "total_loss_mw")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: Total System Losses (MW)

panels.description: Active power output (MW) for all four DG units by sgen_id. sgen_id 0/1 = solar (buses 17, 21) — bell-curve peaking at noon. sgen_id 2/3 = wind (buses 24, 32) — flatter profile driven by DE_wind_profile.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "state")
  |> range(start: 2017-06-07T00:00:00Z, stop: 2017-06-07T23:59:59Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sgen")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "p_mw")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: DG Output — Solar & Wind (MW)

panels.description: Slack bus (substation) active power feed-in (MW). Positive = substation supplying load. Negative = midday reverse power flow (DER generation > feeder demand; excess power flows toward the substation). A hallmark of high-DER distribution operation.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "state")
  |> range(start: 2017-06-07T00:00:00Z, stop: 2017-06-07T23:59:59Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "slack_p_mw")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: Slack / Substation Feed-in (MW)

panels.description: OLTC feeder transformer tap position (integer steps, range -5 to +5). The controller uses line-drop compensation: it regulates a downstream reference bus (idx 17, end of main trunk) into [0.99, 1.01] pu, so the tap actively switches across the day — boosting (more negative tap raises LV voltage) at evening peak and backing off under midday DER. On 2017-06-07 the tap ranges -1 to -4 (4 distinct positions); this also lifts the sagging laterals so the day-wide vmin is ~0.985 pu (>= 0.95).

targets.query:
from(bucket: "state")
  |> range(start: 2017-06-07T00:00:00Z, stop: 2017-06-07T23:59:59Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tap_pos")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: OLTC Tap Position (integer steps, -5 to +5)

title: IEEE33 DER State — 2017-06-07 High-DER DE Day
